*_giai_thich_level_aa_theo_tieu_chuan_wc:
+ Required level in most international standards.
+ Make sure the content is read clearly for people with normal or slightly poor vision.
+ Minimum contrast ratio requirements:
-- 4.5:1 for small text (under 18px regular or under 14px bold).
-- 3:1 for large text or UI components.
*_giai_thich_level_aaa_theo_tieu_chuan_w:
+ Highest level, improving reading ability for people with weak eyesight.
+ Requires higher contrast ratio:
-- 7:1 for small text.
-- 4.5:1 for large text or UI components.

*_giai_thich_aria_label:
- A "hidden label" that helps people with visual impairments or screen readers know what the button, link, or image is for. 
- Without it, people with disabilities cannot know the function of the button (for example, if the button only has an arrow icon, they will not know if it is "Go forward button" or "Back button").
- Google also uses this information to understand content and functionality, helping to optimize SEO and PageSpeed ​​scores.
